scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,admin,server -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-client" "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-admin" "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-server"
scripts.dev:game: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-client" "npm run dev --workspace @trinitywar/game-server"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-client && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-admin && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-server
scripts.build:client: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-client
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @trinitywar/game-server
